title: T-024 — API: reservation override (admin-only) + audit
prompt:
Implement Server Action `overrideReservation({ reservation_id, reason })` per PRD §9.4 release_reason='admin_override'. Caller must hold 'planning.reservation.override' RBAC. Reason min 10 chars (V-PLAN-RES-004). Sets released_at=NOW(), released_by=user, release_reason='admin_override'. LP returns to status='available'. Audit log entry to wo_status_history with action='RESERVATION_OVERRIDE'. Outbox event 'reservation.released'.

RED test asserts RBAC denial for non-admin, reason validation, audit row written.

pipeline_inputs.description: Admin-only manual reservation release with mandatory reason and audit trail.
pipeline_inputs.details: Single transaction: SELECT FOR UPDATE on reservation, UPDATE reservation, UPDATE LP, INSERT wo_status_history, INSERT outbox_event. Idempotency check on already-released reservation returns 409.
acceptance_criteria: Given a non-admin caller, when overrideReservation runs, then HTTP 403 with code 'RESERVATION_OVERRIDE_FORBIDDEN'.
Given an admin and reason='ok' (2 chars), when validated, then HTTP 400 Zod min length 10.
Given a successful override, when reservation is fetched, then released_at is set, release_reason='admin_override', and LP.status='available'.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/server/actions/planning/__tests__/reservation-override.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED tests for RBAC, reason validation, idempotency on re-override.
risk_red_lines: Do not bypass RBAC — V-PLAN-RES-004 hard block.
Do not skip audit log entry.
